{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Redmoon Hall Lady
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Redmoon Hall Lady]] is present in the enemy camp.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
